title: LAND ABANDONMENT IN EUROPE
subtitle: Report on synthesis of impact of policies on agricultural land abandonment and the impact on soil health and landscape processes in the EJP SOIL partner countries
description: A report synthesizing national and EU-level policy impacts on agricultural land abandonment across EJP SOIL partner countries, analyzing effects on soil health and landscape processes. It includes spatial LUCAS-based analysis (2006–2018), a survey of public perceptions, a review of monitoring practices, policy effectiveness assessment, and research trend analysis to identify gaps and hotspots of abandonment in Europe.
